steps.name: check-deps
steps.description: Verify all dependencies (t0001_stt_benchmark, t0004_vocabulary_biasing_experiment) are completed.

steps.name: implementation
steps.description: Run Nemotron 3.5 ASR batch and word-boosted variants on all 93 gold-92 clips, compute metrics.

steps.name: reporting
steps.description: Write results_summary.md, results_detailed.md, prediction assets, and mark task completed.
